name: pre-flight-check
description: Validate inputs, check for existing draft, initialize session context.

input_schema.prompt: Pre-flight check for article {{topic}}. Validate the target keyword, audience, and any existing draft at {{path|content/articles/}}. Initialize the session context with Phase 0 metadata.

name: competitive-research
description: Research top-ranking competitor articles, score them, identify content gaps.

input_schema.prompt: Research topic {{topic}} for keyword {{keyword}}. Search for top 5-8 ranking articles. Score each on the 6-dimension framework. Identify content gaps and differentiation opportunities. Output a structured research report with competitor scores, gap analysis, and killer blueprint. Save to content_research collection.

name: topic-research
description: Gather statistics, sources, and authoritative information for the topic.

input_schema.prompt: Research topic {{topic}} for a technical article. Identify key questions about {{topic}}. Search for accurate, current information. Gather statistics with sources (prefer official docs and primary sources). Output a research summary with key findings, sourced statistics, recommended angle, and sources.

name: synthesize
description: Review research reports and identify the killer angle and article structure.

input_schema.prompt: Synthesize the competitive research and topic research for article on {{topic}}. Review the research reports and competitive analysis. Identify: 1) The killer angle/differentiation, 2) Target article structure with H2 sections, 3) Key statistics to include, 4) FAQ questions to answer. Output a synthesis brief for the writer.

name: writing
description: Write the article following quality standards, voice guide, and SEO best practices.

input_schema.prompt: Write a technical article about {{topic}} targeting {{audience|intermediate}} readers. Target keyword: {{keyword}}. Follow the Technical Voice guide: answer-first, direct, authoritative. Include: frontmatter with title/description/date/tags/author, Key Takeaways box, H2 sections with answer-first openings, FAQ section with direct answers, JSON-LD Article schema, image placeholders (<!-- image: query='...' type='photo|diagram' alt='...' -->), 3-5 internal links, 3-5 external links to authority sources. Word count: 1500-3000. Anti-hallucination: never fabricate statistics, code output, URLs, or quotes. Save to articles collection.

name: fact-check
description: Verify all claims, statistics, and code samples against sources.

input_schema.prompt: Fact-check the article on {{topic}}. Verify: 1) All statistics are sourced and accurate, 2) Code examples are correct and would compile/run, 3) URLs and references point to real resources, 4) No fabricated claims or data, 5) Version numbers and dependency specs are accurate. Report any issues found. If fabricated content is found, mark as FAIL.

name: review
description: Independent quality review and scoring against the 100-point framework. Mandatory gate.

input_schema.prompt: Review the article on {{topic}} against the quality standards framework. Perform a 5-phase audit: 1) Structural Audit (heading hierarchy, frontmatter, word count, URL slug, meta description), 2) Content Quality Audit (answer-first, paragraph length, code quality, originality), 3) Voice & Tone Audit (hedging, passive voice, marketing language, technical specificity), 4) E-E-A-T & Trust Audit (author credentials, sourced stats, date stamps, tradeoffs), 5) SEO & AI Citation Audit (keyword placement, JSON-LD schema, FAQ, internal/external links). Score out of 100. List issues, strengths, critical fixes. Verdict: PASS >= 75, or FAIL with required fixes.

name: fix-loop
description: Apply reviewer fixes if score < 75. Max 2 fix iterations.

input_schema.prompt: Apply fixes to the article on {{topic}} based on reviewer feedback. Fix all issues listed in the review. After fixing, the article must be re-reviewed. Max 2 fix iterations. If after 2 iterations the score is still below 75, mark as FAIL. Track fix iterations in session context.

name: author-validation
description: Validate author attribution — reject generic placeholders.

input_schema.prompt: Validate the author attribution for the article on {{topic}}. Reject: 'Technical Writing Team', 'AI Team', 'Staff', 'Admin', or any generic placeholder. If invalid, replace with a named author from the user's profile or ask the user for their name.

name: internal-link-audit
description: Add 3-5 internal links to related articles with descriptive anchor text.

input_schema.prompt: Audit and add internal links to the article on {{topic}}. Add 3-5 internal links with descriptive anchor text. Query the articles collection to find related articles. Insert links naturally in relevant sections.
Check the word count of the article on {{topic}}. Verify it's between 1500 and 3000 words. If below 1500, add more depth to sections. If above 3000, tighten prose. Log the final word count.

name: delivery
description: Final save with all metadata. Clean up session context.

input_schema.prompt: Finalize the article on {{topic}}. Ensure it's saved to the articles collection with all metadata (title, description, tags, author, dates, JSON-LD schema). Clean up the session context. Output a delivery summary with article title, word count, quality score, and any notes.
